mechanism_narrative: A persistent downward trend in the effective federal funds rate over the trailing 3 months lowers the discount rate applied to equity cash flows, mechanically supporting higher forward S&P 500 valuations over the next 20 trading days regardless of other conditions.
failure_condition: Rank IC between FEDFUNDS trend and 20-day forward SPX return stays below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or returns following declining FEDFUNDS are not statistically higher than baseline (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over a 3-month window, markets price in a deteriorating labor market and increased recession risk, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the following 5 trading days as risk premia rise sharply.
failure_condition: SPX 5-day forward returns are positive or statistically indistinguishable from baseline in more than 55% of triggered episodes over any 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Joint acceleration in retail sales (RSAFS) and housing starts (HOUST) signals broad-based consumer demand strength that compounds into corporate earnings growth over a full quarter, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days; neither series alone captures this compounding demand effect.
failure_condition: The joint RSAFS+HOUST acceleration signal fails to outperform either single-series baseline model in out-of-sample Rank IC over any 3-year rolling window, or IC falls below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: During a confirmed late-cycle expansion (defined by UNRATE below 5.5% and positive industrial production growth), continued month-over-month increases in INDPRO signal sustained corporate output and margin strength, supporting positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days; the same INDPRO increase in a contraction regime does not carry this signal.
failure_condition: In expansion regimes, INDPRO growth fails to produce forward returns exceeding the unconditional mean by a statistically significant margin (p > 0.05) over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When month-over-month CPI growth exceeds 0.4% (annualized inflation surprise), markets rapidly reprice expectations for future Fed tightening, causing negative S&P 500 returns over the subsequent 5 trading days as discount-rate expectations rise abruptly.
failure_condition: Triggered CPI surprise episodes show non-negative median 5-day forward SPX return in more than 55% of instances over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous strong payroll growth (PAYEMS month-over-month increase) combined with a falling unemployment rate (UNRATE) signals tightening labor markets that raise wage-cost concerns and forward Fed tightening odds, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days; either series alone (e.g., payroll growth with flat unemployment) does not reliably produce this effect.
regime_hint: tightening labor market late in expansion
failure_condition: The joint PAYEMS-UNRATE signal underperforms a single-series PAYEMS-only baseline in Rank IC over any 2-year rolling window, or IC is below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: In a housing-cycle upswing regime (HOUST above its trailing 12-month average and rising), sustained housing starts growth leads durable-goods and construction-linked corporate earnings higher over a full quarter, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days; in a housing downturn regime the same HOUST increase does not predict positive returns due to inventory overhang effects.
failure_condition: During confirmed housing upswing regimes, HOUST-based signal fails to produce forward 60-day returns exceeding baseline by a statistically significant margin (p > 0.05) across two consecutive 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A steady month-over-month increase in industrial production (INDPRO) reflects ongoing real economic output growth that supports near-term corporate revenue expectations, producing modestly positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days regardless of macro regime.
failure_condition: Rank IC between INDPRO month-over-month change and 5-day forward SPX return remains below 0.02 over any 2-year rolling window.
